Who I Am

About

Atharva
@AtharvaSecurity
YouTube GitHub
👁 Visitors: 0

Atharva

// Security Researcher · CTF Player · Content Creator

I'm a cybersecurity enthusiast who breaks things to understand how they work. My focus areas are web application security, network penetration testing, and CTF competitions — and I document everything here and on YouTube.

From TryHackMe and HackTheBox walkthroughs to real-world CVE analysis, Android reverse engineering, and bug bounty tips — this channel covers the full spectrum.

My goal is simple: make security knowledge practical, accessible, and actually useful — starting from zero.

Skills & Tools

Web App Pentesting
Network Recon

Burp Suite

Wireshark
